context.summary: Rewrote import pipeline to capture individual notes, lyrics, dynamics, articulations from MuseScore files. Added 8 new DB tables via idempotent migration. Created audit endpoint and audit UI page.
context.root_cause: Previous import pipeline discarded all note data, storing only chord symbols. Analysis had nothing to cross-check chords against.
risk_areas: DB migration creates 8 tables on first request — may timeout on cold start
Raw XML storage in nvarchar(max) column — large scores may hit size limits
MuseScore 4.6.x TPC root note mapping — untested with older MuseScore versions

tests.title: Upload .mscz file captures notes
tests.description: Go to harmonylab.rentyourcio.com, sign in, click Upload, upload 'manha de carnava.mscz'. Check the response message for note count.
tests.expected: Response shows 103 notes, 50 chord symbols. Song appears in song list.

tests.title: Song list shows [notes] badge
tests.description: After upload, check the song list (index.html). The uploaded song should have a [notes] indicator.
tests.expected: Song card for 'Black Orpheus' (or 'manha de carnava') shows green [notes] badge and Audit link.

tests.title: Audit endpoint returns measure data
tests.description: Open browser dev tools or curl: GET /api/v1/songs/{id}/audit for the uploaded song.
tests.expected: JSON response with measures array. Each measure contains notes with beat, note_name, duration_type, velocity fields. Statistics section shows note_count, rest_count, unique_pitches.

tests.title: Audit page loads with note data
tests.description: Click the Audit button/link on the uploaded song (from song list or song detail). Verify the audit.html page loads.
tests.expected: Page shows song title, statistics panel (notes, rests, lyrics, unique pitches, range, avg velocity), measure navigator buttons, and note tables for each measure.

tests.title: Measure navigator works
tests.description: Click different measure numbers in the navigator bar.
tests.expected: Page scrolls/paginates to show the selected measures. Active measure buttons are highlighted blue.

tests.title: Note table shows correct data for Measure 2
tests.description: Navigate to Measure 2 in the audit page.
tests.expected: Shows chord A-7 at beat 1.0. Notes: C5 (half) at beat 1.0, B4 (eighth) at beat 4.0, A4 (eighth) at beat 4.5. Lyrics: 'sing' at beat 1.0, 'to' at beat 4.0, 'the' at beat 4.5.

tests.title: Raw XML tab works
tests.description: Click the 'Raw XML' tab on the audit page.
tests.expected: Shows the raw .mscx XML content in a scrollable code block.

tests.title: Existing songs still work
tests.description: Navigate to Autumn Leaves (song 34). Verify chord display and playback still function.
tests.expected: Chord cards display correctly. Transport controls work. Piano roll shows chord tones.

tests.title: Version shows 2.4.0
tests.description: Check the backend health endpoint: curl https://harmonylab-wmrla7fhwa-uc.a.run.app/health

tests.title: Song list and navigation work
tests.description: Navigate song list, open different songs, go back.
tests.expected: All navigation works. No errors in console.

test_data_notes: Upload 'manha de carnava.mscz' from G:\My Drive\Sheet Music\MuseScore\ as the primary test case. Song is 'Black Orpheus' by Luiz Bonfa — 40 measures, 103 notes, 91 lyrics, 50 chord symbols, key of C, 4/4 time.
cc_observations: 1. MuseScore CLI was NOT installed — custom XML parser used instead (deviation from prompt). Works directly on .mscx XML without music21 or MuseScore executable dependency. 2. Source files are NOT stored in GCS — the 35 existing songs cannot be re-imported without re-uploading original files. 3. The test file 'manha de carnava.mscz' is MuseScore 4.6.4 format (TPC root numbering). 4. The DB migration runs on first request after deploy (may add ~2s to first cold start).
